query:
-- Reset the 5 videos to queued status and clear incorrect render data
UPDATE videos 
SET 
  creatomateStatus = 'queued',
  creatomateRenderId = NULL,
  videoUrl = NULL,
  thumbnailUrl = NULL,
  fileSize = NULL
WHERE id IN (240001, 240002, 240003, 240004, 240005);

SELECT id, scriptId, creatomateStatus FROM videos WHERE id IN (240001, 240002, 240003, 240004, 240005) ORDER BY id;
